lines.english: The God-conscious being is himself the Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਸਰਬ ਕਾ ਧਨੀ ॥੮॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak braham giaanee sarab kaa dhanee |8|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, the God-conscious being is the Lord of all. ||8||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਬਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kee sobhaa braham giaanee banee |
lines.english: The glory of the God-conscious being belongs to the God-conscious being alone.
One who enshrines the Naam within the heart,
who sees the Lord God in all,
who, each and every moment, bows in reverence to the Lord Master
Salok:
- O Nanak, such a one is the true 'touch-nothing Saint', who emancipates everyone. ||1||
One whose tongue does not touch falsehood;
Ashtapadee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਤ੍ਰਿਅ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਪੇਖੈ ਨੇਤ੍ਰ ॥
lines.translit: par tria roop na pekhai netr |
lines.english: whose eyes do not gaze upon the beauty of others' wives,
whose mind is filled with love for the Blessed Vision of the Pure Lord,
who serves the Holy and loves the Saints' Congregation,
who, by Guru's Grace, renounces corruption,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਬਾਸਨਾ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਟਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: man kee baasanaa man te ttarai |
lines.english: who banishes the mind's evil desires from his mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਨ ਸੁਨੈ ਕਾਹੂ ਕੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: karan na sunai kaahoo kee nindaa |
lines.english: whose ears do not listen to slander against anyone,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਜਾਨੈ ਆਪਸ ਕਉ ਮੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te jaanai aapas kau mandaa |
lines.english: who deems himself to be the worst of all,
The true Vaishnaav, the devotee of Vishnu, is the one with whom God is thoroughly pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੋਟਿ ਮਧੇ ਕੋ ਐਸਾ ਅਪਰਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kott madhe ko aisaa aparas |1|
lines.english: - O Nanak, among millions, there is scarcely one such 'touch-nothing Saint'. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਜਿਤ ਪੰਚ ਦੋਖ ਤੇ ਰਹਤ ॥
lines.translit: eindree jit panch dokh te rehat |
lines.english: who conquers his sexual instincts and is free of the five sinful passions
Performing good deeds, he does not seek rewards.
Spotlessly pure is the religion of such a Vaishnaav;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਨ ਕੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਭਿੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: bisan kee maaeaa te hoe bhin |
lines.english: He dwells apart from Maya.
He is absorbed in devotional worship and the singing of Kirtan, the songs of the Lord's Glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੂ ਫਲ ਕੀ ਇਛਾ ਨਹੀ ਬਾਛੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaahoo fal kee ichhaa nahee baachhai |
lines.english: he has no desire for the fruits of his labors.
Within his mind and body, he meditates in remembrance on the Lord of the Universe.
He holds fast to the Naam, and inspires others to chant it.
He is kind to all creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਓਹੁ ਬੈਸਨੋ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak ohu baisano param gat paavai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, such a Vaishnaav obtains the supreme status. ||2||
All doubts are removed from his mind.
He forsakes the company of all wicked people.
The true Bhagaautee, the devotee of Adi Shakti, loves the devotional worship of God.
In the Company of the Holy, the filth of sin is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਭਗਉਤੀ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: tis bhgautee kee mat aootam hovai |
lines.english: The wisdom of such a Bhagaautee becomes supreme.
He performs devotional service to the Supreme Lord God in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਐਸਾ ਭਗਉਤੀ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਕਉ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak aisaa bhgautee bhagavant kau paavai |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, such a Bhagaautee attains the Lord God. ||3||
He dedicates his mind and body to the Love of God.
The Lotus Feet of the Lord abide in his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਵੰਤ ਕੀ ਟਹਲ ਕਰੈ ਨਿਤ ਨੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhagavant kee ttehal karai nit neet |
lines.english: He constantly performs the service of the Supreme Lord God.
He drinks in the Exquisite Nectar of the Lord's Name.
He is a true Pandit, a religious scholar, who instructs his own mind.
He searches for the Lord's Name within his own soul.
He implants the Sermon of the Lord in his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪੰਡਿਤੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: so panddit fir jon na aavai |
lines.english: Such a Pandit is not cast into the womb of reincarnation again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸੁ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਕੈ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਜਗੁ ਜੀਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aus panddit kai upades jag jeevai |
lines.english: By that Pandit's teachings, the world lives.
He understands the fundamental essence of the Vedas, the Puraanas and the Simritees.
He gives instruction to people of all castes and social classes.
In the unmanifest, he sees the manifest world to exist.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਸੁ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਅਦੇਸੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak us panddit kau sadaa ades |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, to such a Pandit, I bow in salutation forever. ||4||
The Beej Mantra, the Seed Mantra, is spiritual wisdom for everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਹੁ ਵਰਨਾ ਮਹਿ ਜਪੈ ਕੋਊ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: chahu varanaa meh japai koaoo naam |
lines.english: Anyone, from any class, may chant the Naam.
By His Grace, He enshrines it within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਜਪੈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo japai tis kee gat hoe |
lines.english: Whoever chants it, is emancipated.
And yet, rare are those who attain it, in the Company of the Holy.
The Naam is the panacea, the remedy to cure all ills.
Singing the Glory of God is the embodiment of bliss and emancipation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੁ ਪ੍ਰੇਤ ਮੁਘਦ ਪਾਥਰ ਕਉ ਤਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: pas pret mughad paathar kau taarai |
lines.english: Even beasts, ghosts and the stone-hearted are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੂ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਧਰਮਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaahoo jugat kitai na paaeeai dharam |
lines.english: It cannot be obtained by any religious rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਕਰਮਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak tis milai jis likhiaa dhur karam |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone obtains it, whose karma is so pre-ordained. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕਾ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis kai man paarabraham kaa nivaas |
lines.english: One whose mind is a home for the Supreme Lord God
